/threads/cron/-t1-thread-create-tool-call--use-execute-tool----ba374a18-3c8a-4ebb-8b85-733db7ab4e48.md

# [T1 thread-create+tool-call] Use execute-tool...
Folder: cron

user: [T1b tool-help-detail] Call execute-tool with toolName='tool-help', instanceId='hermes', input={'toolName':'generate_image'}. Check that the result contains a name, a description, and a parameters schema. End your reply with STEP_OK if all three were present, or FAILED: <what was missing> if anything was wrong.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: STEP_OK
user: [T2 image-gen] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'red circle'}. Check that the result contains a non-empty imageUrl and a positive creditCost. End your reply with STEP_OK if everything was correct, or FAILED: <reason> if anything was wrong.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: STEP_OK
user: [T3a retry-branch] Say exactly: RETRY_RESPONSE STEP_OK
assistant: RETRY_RESPONSE STEP_OK
user: [T3b fork-branch] Say exactly: BRANCH_RESPONSE STEP_OK
assistant: BRANCH_RESPONSE STEP_OK
user: [T4a music-gen] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_music', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'upbeat piano melody'}. Check that the result has a non-empty audioUrl, a positive creditCost, and durationSeconds between 8 and 120. End your reply with STEP_OK if everything was correct, or FAILED: <reason> if anything was wrong.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: STEP_OK
user: [T4b video-gen] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_video', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'spinning cube'}. Check that the result has a non-empty videoUrl, a positive creditCost, and a positive durationSeconds. End your reply with STEP_OK if everything was correct, or FAILED: <reason> if anything was wrong.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: STEP_OK
